note: Curated design-trend presets to TEST aesthetics against SemiAnalysis topics. Each is a reusable style recipe the prompt-smith locks to. `sampleFile` (if present) is a real generation on the shared neutral subject so the gallery is apples-to-apples. Reverse-engineered references get appended here as new presets. None render text-in-image.
sampleSubject: a colossal AI datacenter — endless rows of server racks, power and liquid-cooling infrastructure, cathedral scale

styles.name: Dotted Old Master
styles.blurb: Classical oil painting under a vintage lithograph dot screen. Allegorical, scroll-stopping. The current house lead.
styles.styleBlock: dotted old school oil painting, vintage lithograph halftone texture, muted colors, soft painterly light, allegorical composition
styles.palette: muted ink and cream with warm amber glow and deep blue shadows

styles.name: Steel Engraving
styles.blurb: 19th-century banknote / broadsheet engraving — fine cross-hatched linework, authoritative, WSJ-hedcut energy.
styles.styleBlock: intricate steel engraving, fine cross-hatching and stippling, banknote linework, ink on aged cream paper, high detail
styles.palette: monochrome ink on cream, optional single amber spot

styles.name: Risograph Tech
styles.blurb: Two-color riso print — grainy, slightly misregistered, warm and indie-editorial.
styles.styleBlock: two-color risograph print, heavy paper grain, slight ink misregistration, limited palette, flat bold shapes, screenprint texture
styles.palette: amber and blue duotone on cream

styles.name: Blueprint Schematic
styles.blurb: Cyanotype engineering blueprint — white technical linework and annotations on deep blue. Precise, engineering-forward.
styles.styleBlock: technical blueprint schematic, white and cyan line drawing on deep blue ground, dimension lines and annotations, cyanotype grain, exploded technical view
styles.palette: deep blueprint blue with white/cyan lines and amber callouts

styles.name: Isometric Silicon
styles.blurb: Clean isometric 3D technical illustration of dies, wafers, racks. Modern, orderly, premium-tech.
styles.styleBlock: clean isometric 3D technical illustration, precise vector-like forms, subtle ambient occlusion, matte finish, orderly grid layout, no text
styles.palette: muted slate and cream with amber and blue accents

styles.name: Halftone Poster
styles.blurb: Bold CMYK halftone poster — high contrast, punchy, Economist-cover-meets-pop.
styles.styleBlock: bold halftone print poster, oversized ben-day dots, high contrast, limited flat colors, dramatic simplified composition, screenprint edges
styles.palette: ink black, amber, and blue on cream, high contrast

styles.name: Brutalist Grid
styles.blurb: Swiss/brutalist geometry — stark shapes, hard grid, generous negative space, confident and minimal.
styles.styleBlock: swiss brutalist graphic composition, stark geometric shapes, hard-edged grid, heavy negative space, flat matte color fields, minimal
styles.palette: ink and cream with a single amber or blue block

styles.name: Woodcut / Linocut
styles.blurb: High-contrast carved woodblock print — bold black shapes, gouged texture, one spot color. Timeless and striking.
styles.styleBlock: high-contrast woodcut linocut print, bold carved black shapes, visible gouge marks, rough hand-printed texture, single spot color
styles.palette: black on cream with one amber or blue spot color

styles.name: Diagrammatic Ink
styles.blurb: Da Vinci notebook — hand-inked technical diagram / exploded view in sepia. Intellectual, exploratory.
styles.styleBlock: hand-inked technical diagram, exploded mechanical view, sepia ink on aged paper, annotation arrows and measurement marks, renaissance notebook study
styles.palette: sepia and iron-gall ink on aged cream

styles.name: Aerial Thermal
styles.blurb: False-color satellite / thermal — fabs and datacenters from above as heatmaps. Data-driven, a little ominous.
styles.styleBlock: false-color aerial satellite view, thermal heatmap gradients, top-down infrastructure geometry, data-overlay grid, high-altitude reconnaissance
styles.palette: deep blue-to-amber thermal gradient on ink

styles.name: Long-Exposure Neon
styles.blurb: Cinematic dark photography — long-exposure light trails through hardware, moody and modern.
styles.styleBlock: cinematic long-exposure photograph, light trails and motion streaks through hardware, deep shadow, shallow depth of field, volumetric haze, dark modern
styles.palette: near-black with neon blue and amber light trails

styles.name: Chip Macro
styles.blurb: Extreme macro of silicon / PCB — abstract circuit fields, bokeh, moody and premium-abstract.
styles.styleBlock: extreme macro photography of silicon die and circuit board, abstract circuit fields, shallow depth of field with bokeh, moody studio lighting, ultra fine detail
styles.palette: dark substrate with amber traces and blue reflections

styles.name: Constructivist Poster
styles.blurb: Soviet-constructivist propaganda geometry — bold diagonals, dynamic, powerful. Fits geopolitics beats.
styles.styleBlock: russian constructivist propaganda poster, bold diagonal composition, dynamic geometric shapes, photomontage fragments, heavy stencil forms
styles.palette: ink black and cream with dominant amber and blue

styles.name: Retro-Futurist Grid
styles.blurb: Restrained retro-future — a receding grid horizon and clean gradients, tech-culture but NOT cheesy vaporwave.
styles.styleBlock: restrained retro-futurist illustration, receding perspective grid horizon, clean smooth gradients, subtle scanline texture, minimal chrome forms
styles.palette: muted amber-to-blue gradient over ink, sparing
